title: chaenorhinum rupestre
intro: Chaenorhinum rupestre, also known as dwarf toadflax, is a small, flowering plant species that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Chaenorhinum rupestre include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Chaenorhinum rupestre is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory ailments.
